name: Accessibility Learning Agent
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure AI Speech
services.purpose: Text-to-speech for screen reader content, speech-to-text for voice input, custom neural voices for consistent learning experience

prod.note: ~200 audio hours STT, ~10M chars TTS, neural voices

enterprise.note: ~800 audio hours, custom neural voice, real-time

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for adaptive content simplification, dyslexia-aware text rewriting, multi-modal explanations, and personalized pacing

services.name: Azure AI Vision
services.purpose: Image description for visually impaired learners, diagram interpretation, math equation OCR, document accessibility scanning

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Accessibility API — content adapter, speech pipeline, multi-modal renderer, learner profile engine, WCAG compliance layer

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Learner accessibility profiles, adaptation preferences, session history, content transformations, progress tracking

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for accessibility analytics

services.name: Azure AI Content Safety
services.purpose: Content moderation for vulnerable learner population — enhanced protections for disability-related interactions

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, encryption keys for disability-related PII, OAuth secrets, accessibility profile encryption

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Accessibility effectiveness, speech recognition accuracy, content adaptation quality, learner engagement by modality

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine text simplification and formatting, reserve GPT-4o for complex multi-modal explanations and dyslexia-aware rewriting — saves 65% on AI costs
Cache TTS audio for common curriculum phrases and instructions — avoids regenerating identical speech segments across sessions
Pre-generate image descriptions for standard curriculum diagrams and store in AI Search — reduces real-time Vision API calls by 80%
Use speech recognition confidence thresholds to avoid unnecessary re-processing — accept high-confidence transcriptions without verification
Batch accessibility scans for new curriculum content during upload — avoid per-request scanning for previously cleared materials
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
